213.reason: [Incorrectly returns a valid token type 'AND' for a single '&', which is an error; should not return a token at all or should return an invalid/placeholder token, but more critically, it fails to handle end-of-input after reading '&']

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly returns a valid token type 'AND' for a single '&', which is an error; should not return a token at all or should return an invalid/placeholder token, but more critically, it fails to handle end-of-input after reading '&']

225.reason: [Incorrectly returns a valid token type 'OR' for a single '|', which is an error; same issue as above. Also, if the single '&' or '|' is at the end of file, accessing sourceCode.charAt(tokenIndex) will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 0.5 , reason:  [Incorrectly returns a valid token type 'OR' for a single '|', which is an error; same issue as above. Also, if the single '&' or '|' is at the end of file, accessing sourceCode.charAt(tokenIndex) will cause IndexOutOfBoundsException]
